title: BetterCraftMine
description: A small modpack for the craftmine update, has some improvements like the minecrafter being indestructible.
body:
makes the craftmine update better, by making the minecrafter indestructible, and adding creative mode, and some more things, not alot.

I will be adding more mods if more get supported.




<details>
<summary>coolest mod features</summary>

:makes the minecrafter better, and indestructible (better minecrafter)

:adds creative mode (creative mines)

:hold a light block to light the area around you up (lambdynamiclights)

:show every block you're looking at (jade)

:play with your friends (e4mc (craftmine port))

:more competitive (craftmine dailies) 

:and some more things

</details>
